prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约2117名、4000名、1761名、1719名、4337名，整体波动较大。2021–2024年基本稳定在1700–2100名区间，2022年因专业组调整出现4000名的异常值；2025年位次大幅后移至4337名，较2024年下降约2618名，主要受招生专业分档变化（增设卓越优才计划专业组）及当年考生报考心理影响。2025年4337名作为基准位次；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021–2022年为52人，2023–2024年缩减至40人，2025年进一步降至39人；2026年计划大幅扩增至57人，较2025年增加18人（增幅约46%），扩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争有所缓和，位次数字应有明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名中校本部2026年位列第12名（Top20），深圳校区共享校本部声誉与学科资源，属顶尖工科院校；2026年高考周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10，评价为高热，短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线暴跌相关讨论，但2025年深圳校区在湖北位次已大幅后移，该信号已被市场消化；校本部第五轮学科评估中，机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，力学为A+，控制科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、土木工程、电气工程、管理科学与工程等为A，仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、建筑学、航空宇航科学与技术等为A-，工科实力极为突出。深圳校区招生专业以工科试验班大类为主，覆盖计算机、电子通信、自动化、电气、机器人、集成电路等热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，人工智能、能源动力等方向也偏热；土木建筑、生化环材等传统劝退专业在深圳校区招生中占比极低。湖北省2026年普通高考总考生约39.37万人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约39.12万人略有增加，竞争总体平稳。；深圳校区位于广东省深圳市，地处粤港澳大湾区核心城市，地域吸引力强，对湖北省高分考生有较强吸引力；该校在湖北省无本地招生倾斜，全国统一竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4337名、2026年大幅扩招46%（计划从39人增至57人）使位次后移约1200名至5538名附近，但考虑到哈工大深圳为顶尖C9工科院校、计算机/电子信息等专业热度持续高热、深圳地域吸引力强、抖音高热反映报考关注度高，这些因素会吸引更多高分考生报考，部分抵消扩招带来的位次后移效应。经综合权衡，预测2026年物理类最低位次约5488名，区间4988–5988名。

- 工科试验班（自主智能；人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2117, 4000, 1761, 1719, and 4337, showing significant fluctuations. From 2021 to 2024, rankings were generally stable in the 1700–2100 range, with an outlier of 4000 in 2022 due to major group adjustments; in 2025, the ranking dropped significantly to 4337, a decrease of about 2618 from 2024, mainly due to changes in enrollment major classifications (addition of the Excellence Talent Program major group) and the impact of candidates' application psychology that year. The 2025 ranking of 4337 serves as the baseline; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei was 52 students from 2021 to 2022, reduced to 40 from 2023 to 2024, and further decreased to 39 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 57 students, an increase of 18 (about 46%) from 2025, a substantial expansion that theoretically eases competition and should cause a noticeable backward shift in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranked 12th (Top 20) in 2026. The Shenzhen campus shares the reputation and academic resources of the main campus and is a top-tier engineering university; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; the university ranks 10th in overall popularity on Douyin, evaluated as high heat, with significant exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention; there were discussions about a sharp drop in admission thresholds in 2024, but the Shenzhen campus's ranking in Hubei has already significantly shifted backward in 2025, indicating this signal has been absorbed by the market; in the main campus's fifth round of discipline evaluation, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering received A+, Mechanics received A+, Control Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering received A, and Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Architecture, and Aerospace Science and Technology received A-, demonstrating extremely strong engineering capabilities. The Shenzhen campus's enrollment majors are mainly engineering experimental classes, covering popular fields such as computer science, electronic communication, automation, electrical engineering, robotics, and integrated circuits.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of major popularity in 2026 shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, while Artificial Intelligence, Energy and Power Engineering, and other directions are also relatively hot; traditional discouraged majors like Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials account for a very low proportion in the Shenzhen campus's enrollment. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hubei is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from about 391,200 in 2025 (Physics + History categories), indicating generally stable competition. The Shenzhen campus is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, at the core of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, with strong regional appeal and strong attraction for high-scoring candidates in Hubei; the university has no local enrollment bias in Hubei, with nationwide unified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4337 and the significant 46% enrollment expansion in 2026 (plan increased from 39 to 57 students), the ranking is expected to shift backward by about 1200 to around 5538. However, considering that HIT Shenzhen is a top C9 engineering university, the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the strong regional appeal of Shenzhen, and high Douyin heat reflecting high candidate attention, these factors will attract more high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the backward shift effect of the enrollment expansion. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 5488, with a range of 4988–5988.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information; Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence; Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Joint Training Class; Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellence Joint Training Class; Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellence Joint Training Class; Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellence Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5488, range 4988–5988. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Future Intelligent Manufacturing, Future Energy) as the main direction, with Tier 1 (Future Information, Autonomous Intelligence) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Future City, Mathematics) as a safety. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (<4988) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约835名、1059名、1488名、1930名、1149名，整体呈先降后升的V形走势。2021–2024年位次持续后移（从835名降至1930名），2025年大幅回升至1149名，较2024年上升约781名，波动剧烈。2025年1149名作为基准位次；该校在湖北省历史类招生计划波动极大：2021–2022年仅3人，2023–2024年扩至14人，2025年骤降至2人。2026年招生计划文件中未包含历史类数据。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/C9/双一流，软科2026年校本部第12名，深圳校区共享声誉，属顶尖院校；2026年哈工大声誉中性/混合，抖音高热，无明显负面舆情；哈工大以工科见长，历史类招生专业仅经济管理试验班（会计学）和建筑类（智慧人居类），无直接对应的A类文科优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，会计/财务/审计2024–2026年热度为推荐（偏热），建筑类属土木建筑大类（分化观望）。湖北省2026年总考生约39.37万人，历史类考生占比需按近年比例估算：2025年历史类14.14万人/物理类24.98万人，历史类占比约36.1%，2026年估算历史类约14.2万人，与2025年基本持平。；深圳校区地域吸引力强，但历史类招生专业少、计划极不稳定，报考风险较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1149名、2026年计划、历史类招生计划极不稳定（2–14人剧烈波动）、会计学专业热度偏热但建筑类热度分化，预计2026年历史类最低位次约1179名，区间1038–1320名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 835, 1059, 1488, 1930, and 1149, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. Rankings continuously dropped from 2021 to 2024 (from 835 to 1930), then sharply rose to 1149 in 2025, an increase of about 781 places compared to 2024, indicating high volatility. The 2025 ranking of 1149 serves as the baseline; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province fluctuated greatly: only 3 students in 2021–2022, expanded to 14 in 2023–2024, and sharply dropped to 2 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan document does not include History Category data.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/C9/Double First-Class, ranked 12th nationally in the main campus by Soft Science in 2026, the Shenzhen campus shares the reputation, belonging to top-tier institutions; in 2026, HIT's reputation is neutral/mixed, with high popularity on Douyin and no significant negative public opinion; HIT is strong in engineering, with History Category enrollment majors only including Economics and Management Pilot Class (Accounting) and Architecture Class (Smart Human Settlement), lacking directly corresponding A-level liberal arts advantage disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category enrollment majors, Accounting/Finance/Auditing had a popularity rating of recommended (slightly hot) from 2024 to 2026, while Architecture belongs to the civil engineering and architecture category (differentiated wait-and-see). In 2026, Hubei Province had approximately 393,700 total examinees, with the proportion of History Category examinees estimated based on recent years: in 2025, 141,400 History Category / 249,800 Physics Category, History Category accounting for about 36.1%, estimated at about 142,000 in 2026, roughly the same as 2025. The Shenzhen campus has strong regional appeal, but History Category has few enrollment majors and highly unstable plans, posing higher application risks.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1149, the 2026 plan, the highly unstable History Category enrollment plan (fluctuating sharply between 2 and 14), the slightly hot popularity of Accounting but differentiated popularity of Architecture, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1179, with a range of 1038–1320.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None currently (History Category has very few enrollment majors, only 1–2 majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Architecture Class (Smart Human Settlement; Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1179, range 1038–1320. History Category enrollment plan is extremely small and volatile, with higher application risks. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Economics and Management Pilot Class as the main target, with Architecture Class as a backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1038), one can aim for Economics and Management Pilot Class.
